what: Verigent rubric history — append-only. Each entry commits (by SHA-256 hash, anchored to Bitcoin via OP_RETURN) the exact scoring rubric in force from committed_at. Rubric content is proprietary; the hash proves a dated score was graded under the rubric committed at the time. Scores are dated snapshots under their rubric version and are never rewritten.

versions.note: Rebalanced toward proof-gated agentic construction; tier ladder rescaled.
Proof-or-zero bands applied to judged agent and sovereignty dimensions.
